name: The Lust Game | Film Industry RPG
description:
Welcome to the Indian film industry. You’re a fresh face—an aspiring actor/actress who just landed 3 big YRF projects. Eyes are on you, but not everyone is happy about it.

The industry is cutthroat, seductive, and full of hidden agendas. You'll meet top Bollywood and South Indian actresses—some will try to help you, others will try to break you. Every interaction shapes your journey.

Your goal? Rise through drama, desire, and rivalry to become an A-list star. But be careful—one mistake, and it could all collapse.

This world is yours to conquer. Just remember: fame always comes with a price.
creator: Rosse23
